---
title: "Indian Socio-Economic Geography"
subtitle: "Socio-economic dimensions of Indian geography — development, disparities, and planning."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

Welcome to the **Indian Socio-Economic Geography** module.

---

{{< include geography-of-india/05-indian-agriculture.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-india/09-population-dynamics.md >}}
{{< include geography-of-india/10-globalisation-impact.md >}}

---
